programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: Jennifer, a garage sale shopping expert with sharp observation skills, helps the local police department investigate crimes and solve mysteries. While arranging a charity garage sale event, Jennifer finds a body in the attic of a local residence. At first she thinks the cause of death was an accidental fall, but when she learns that the victim was trying to call 911, she begins to suspect foul play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a café where everyone falls in love could lose everything when a major celebrity proposes and gets dumped, so she vows to get him and his would-be fiancée back together, only to fall for him herself.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A perennially single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the cut-throat NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: After her public breakup, Charley, determined founder of a dating app, is near bankruptcy. She teams up with Liam, a self-assured and innovative marketing expert, to save her company.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: Jennifer, a garage sale shopping expert with sharp observation skills, helps the local police department investigate crimes and solve mysteries. While arranging a charity garage sale event, Jennifer finds a body in the attic of a local residence. At first she thinks the cause of death was an accidental fall, but when she learns that the victim was trying to call 911, she begins to suspect foul play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a café where everyone falls in love could lose everything when a major celebrity proposes and gets dumped, so she vows to get him and his would-be fiancée back together, only to fall for him herself.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A perennially single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the cut-throat NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy helps Cass handle a spirited horse, a lot rides on their success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty celebrate their anniversary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty performs surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work to bottle-feed its twin foals.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Steal Your Heart
programme.desc: A mix up over a purchase leaves amateur jeweler Melissa being enlisted by the CEO of the biggest jewelry company in Miami to help create a bridal line with the CEO's too-serious son, Jake.

programme.title: Hashtag Proposal
programme.desc: A fake marriage proposal goes viral, and all the attention helps two strangers with their struggling businesses. Millie and Leo play pretend while trying to ignore their growing feelings.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Higher Ground
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, a New Orleans handyman and blues singer is left homeless before he has the chance to declaring himself via a love letter.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty performs surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work to bottle-feed its twin foals.

programme.title: Steal Your Heart
programme.desc: A mix up over a purchase leaves amateur jeweler Melissa being enlisted by the CEO of the biggest jewelry company in Miami to help create a bridal line with the CEO's too-serious son, Jake.

programme.title: Hashtag Proposal
programme.desc: A fake marriage proposal goes viral, and all the attention helps two strangers with their struggling businesses. Millie and Leo play pretend while trying to ignore their growing feelings.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Higher Ground
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, a New Orleans handyman and blues singer is left homeless before he has the chance to declaring himself via a love letter.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Beach Murder
programme.desc: Jenn suspects foul play when the body of an avid surfer is found on an isolated beach, the victim of an apparent drowning.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: When Stephanie inherits a watch, she learns that it allows her to travel back in time five minutes one time each day. As she uses it more and more, her life and romance with her co-worker Hunter don't shake out the way she had hoped.

programme.title: Two Chefs and a Wedding Cake
programme.desc: At her sister's wedding, a food critic meets a chef known for excluding food reviewers entry to his restaurant and must find a way to reconcile their differences.

programme.title: Love by Request
programme.desc: Recently divorced hair stylist, Jenny, on a mission to reconnect with Liam, her college sweetheart, is shocked to learn that he is 'Dr. Love', the DJ she listens to on the radio. As the couple's relationship slowly reignites, Jenny discovers that Liam is already engaged. Will Jenny's heart break a second time, or can true love prevail?

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Beach Murder
programme.desc: Jenn suspects foul play when the body of an avid surfer is found on an isolated beach, the victim of an apparent drowning.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: When Stephanie inherits a watch, she learns that it allows her to travel back in time five minutes one time each day. As she uses it more and more, her life and romance with her co-worker Hunter don't shake out the way she had hoped.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The Heartland family must deal with Amy and Ty's decision about their future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Honeymoon Pact
programme.desc: Ella goes on honeymoon with friend Lindsey after being left at the altar. Lindsey finds love on the trip and hides the romance from her best friend.

programme.title: My One True Love
programme.desc: A woman is told by a gypsy that she'll fall in love with a man named John, so her friends turn her life upside down to help her date every John they collectively know to find the one.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Home Again
programme.desc: When the Postables discover an antique vase, they trace it back to three girls who attempted to sell it in to save their family farm. With the farm again facing hardship, the Postables must choose between doing what's legal and what's moral.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim gets caught in the middle of Jade's feud with a new bronco rider.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Home Again
programme.desc: When the Postables discover an antique vase, they trace it back to three girls who attempted to sell it in to save their family farm. With the farm again facing hardship, the Postables must choose between doing what's legal and what's moral.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Murder by Text
programme.desc: A concert rehearsal is stalled when the bass player dies from an apparent suicide. Jenn discovers that a stun gun was used to immobilize the victim before her death, but before Jenn can confront the weapon's owner, another band member is murdered.

programme.title: The Perfect Man(icure)
programme.desc: Quirky inventor Katya partners with charismatic marketing consultant Ryan to help sell her personal manicure device, Phenomenails, at the upcoming beauty expo.

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: A reluctant billionaire goes to Bali as a donor and meets a beautiful female doctor working there. Both leave their prejudices behind and fall in love.
